evals.expected_output: A full GEO audit report for notion.com with a composite score, 4 dimension sub-scores, prioritized issues, and a markdown report file. Business type should be detected as SaaS.
expectations: Business type is detected as SaaS or Technology
Report contains all 4 dimension scores (Technical, Citability, Schema, Brand)
Composite GEO score is calculated using the weighted formula
A grade letter (A-F) is assigned based on the score
A markdown report file is written to disk
JSON-LD templates are generated for missing schemas

evals.prompt: I run a local bakery website at https://example-bakery.com and ChatGPT never mentions us when people ask for bakeries in our area. Can you figure out why?
evals.expected_output: This eval tests degraded behavior with an unreachable URL. The audit should detect the URL is unreachable, report it as a critical issue, and still provide general Local business GEO recommendations based on the business context described in the prompt.
expectations: URL unreachable is reported as a critical issue
Business type is inferred as Local from the prompt context
General Local business GEO recommendations are provided (LocalBusiness schema, directory presence, NAP consistency)
Report explains that a full audit requires an accessible URL
Partial results are gracefully handled without crashing

evals.expected_output: A GEO audit for a major publisher site. Should detect Publisher type and emphasize content citability, Article schema, author markup, and news-specific optimizations. Should score relatively high on brand signals due to strong entity recognition.
expectations: Business type is detected as Publisher or Media
Citability analysis evaluates article content quality
Schema analysis checks for Article/NewsArticle markup
Brand score reflects strong entity recognition (Wikipedia presence)
Technical analysis checks for proper canonical URLs and meta tags
Content analysis identifies citable passages from articles
